photos.ratingReason: Gorgeous turquoise lagoon and small distant island make an appealing tropical scene, but the sky dominates too much of the frame and the lone platform is a weak focal point, keeping it pleasant rather than memorable.

photos.caption: Aitutaki
photos.ratingReason: Gorgeous turquoise water and clear tropical color, but the vast empty foreground and tiny distant island make it pleasant yet ordinary rather than a compelling hero shot.
